review_scope: Combined implementer/tester/documenter diff on verifier branch against test-fixes, limited to the touched tactical fixtures, documentation updates, and task artifacts.
assumptions: Used test-fixes...HEAD as the bounded review diff because verifier_prompt.txt identifies test-fixes as the merge-base assumption for the tester/documenter branch stack and branch ancestry matches that assumption.
test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: FTacticalCombatReportTest now covers report lifecycle, normalization, and standalone-event detachment behavior through FTacticalGame public APIs, and FTacticalDamageSummaryGUITest verifies that only per-attack internal events contribute hit-detail text while standalone events remain in ship rollups.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md describe the behavioral coverage shift, the per-attack internal-event hit-detail rule, and the removal of the touched architecture-coupled source-inspection checks.
verification_commands: cd tests && set -o pipefail && ./tactical/TacticalTests 2>&1 | grep -E '!!!FAILURES!!!|Run:|Failures:|WXTacticalUIAdapterTest::' ; echo EXIT_CODE:$?
